summary: Backend-only testing of Hunter Strength System. Created /app/backend/tests/test_hunter_api.py covering all 9 endpoints + rank boundary edge cases. All 16 tests PASSED (100%) including the live Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI coach via emergentintegrations.

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 200 on create; idiomatic would be 201. Not a bug since tests pass; consider for polish.
Streak logic treats diff==2 days as continuing streak (line ~361). Spec is unclear but typical streak resets after 1 missed day; verify intent.

History filter uses 'Bench Press' substring which also includes 'Close-Grip Bench'/'Pause Squat' edge cases via 'Back Squat' but excludes them by exact substring check — works but fragile; consider tagging is_main in logs.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 593 lines — approaching the 700 line guideline. Consider splitting into routes/, services/, models/ for maintainability as features grow.
AI coach endpoint silently returns a 200 with '[SYSTEM OFFLINE]' on LLM failure — frontend cannot distinguish from a real System message except by substring. Consider an error flag in the response.
load_dotenv timing is correct (top of file before env access).
MongoDB _id properly excluded in all GET responses.
Workout block correctly generates 24 workouts (6 weeks x 4 days) for default training_days=4.
seed_data_creation: Tests create transient TEST_ prefixed profiles; all cleaned up after run via mongosh deleteMany.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully verified. Use BASE_URL=http://localhost:8001 (or EXPO_BACKEND_URL for external). All 9 endpoints + rank boundary table + AI coach end-to-end (real Claude Sonnet 4.5 call) confirmed working. Rank thresholds verified at exact boundaries 499/500/599/600/700/800/900. XP math for a perfect squat day = 325 (100 base + 150 squat-day + 50 all-hit + 25 RPE). Boss fight regenerates block (resets completed_count to 0) and unlocks squat_200/bench_140/deadlift_240/rank_c/boss_slayer.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. AI coach succeeded — confirmed EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is set in /app/backend/.env and emergentintegrations import path 'emergentintegrations.llm.chat' with model anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 works.
